text: Zoro's 'Nothing Happened' moment is over-hyped. Kuma was never a true threat to the Strawhats because it was all just a test. And as great as this moment is, it does not deserve to be in as many top 10 best One Piece moments as it is, yet fans consistently place it as one. Considering Sanji also had a moment of sacrificing himself in the same arc, Zoro's dramatic sacrifice should be treated the same, yet it's not. It's always treated as this grand thing, even tho Zoro was never in any danger since Kuma was never going to kill Luffy, Zoro or any of the Strawhats.
label: Hot_Take
